error_signature: trigger doesn't detect anything at all
title: Telegram trigger not detecting messages
symptom: The Telegram trigger is listening, but no messages are detected when sent from the bot.
applies_when: Messages are sent from the bot
not_this_if: Messages are detected in other workflows
Trigger works in a different environment
root_cause: The Telegram trigger requires a Chat Memory Session Key to properly identify and process incoming messages. If this key is not defined, the trigger will not recognize any messages sent to it.
fix_steps: Add a Set node before the Telegram trigger in your workflow.
Define the Chat Memory Session Key using the expression: {{ $('Telegram Message Trigger').item.json.message.from.id }}.
Save the workflow and test sending a message again.
agent_instruction: Define the Chat Memory Session Key in a Set node before the Telegram trigger.
